feed.title: SAP Community - Certification
feed.subtitle: Certification blog posts in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Business Data Cloud Certification (C_BCBDC): The Ultimate Guide to Passing SAP’s New AI Scenario
entry.content:
Introduction

Certification is changing, and it is a good thing. Instead of cramming facts and guessing at multiple choice, you are invited to think like you do on the job. You will work through real scenarios, connect the dots, and show how you deliver outcomes. In this post we will talk about what is new, and how to prepare for SAP BDC (C_BCBDC) certification.

Understanding the New BDC Certification Format - Scenario Based

You will interact with an AI avatar to respond to real customer or project situations. For learners who prefer not to use AI there is an alternative option to upload a video for human review. Link for more details : SAP Certification is Changing What You Need to Know about the New Format, Reimagining Certification

Preparation

SAP BDC Learning Journey

For the best chance of success, complete the full SAP Business Data Cloud learning journey from start to finish. Treat every module, hands on exercise, and quiz as required to build real exam readiness. Give special attention to the core topics below

Core Topics in SAP Business Data Cloud

1. BDC

  • One domain model
  • SAP 4 Me
  • Formations
  • Intelligent Applications
  • Data Products
  • Data Security
  • Architecture
  • BDC Cockpit
  • Zero copy
  • ORD / CSN
  • Data Lake

2. SAP Datasphere Integration

  • BDC-generated spaces
  • Harmonization through modeling
  • Semantic enrichment
  • Extending SAP-delivered models
  • Installing data products to a space

3. SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)

  • Role of SAC in BDC
  • Extending and discovering intelligent applications
  • Use cases for intelligent applications

4. BW Modernization

  • Lift, shift, and innovate strategies
  • Data Product Generator
  • Subscriptions and versions
  • Why BW is included in BDC

5. SAP Databricks Integration

  • ML Flow, delta share, notebooks, Unity Catalog
  • Exploratory Data Analysis
  • Industry use cases
  • Sharing data products and ML results between Databricks and BDC

Sample Scenarios to Understand the Exam Format

Scenario 1: Global Manufacturing Company – Unified Analytics & Governance

Context: A global manufacturing company operates across Europe and Asia. They run SAP S/4HANA, legacy SAP BW, and several non-SAP systems for logistics and procurement. Leadership wants a single, governed analytics platform with reusable data products and ready-made insights.

Question: How does BDC help

Scenario 2: Financial Services Firm – AI-Driven Risk & Compliance Reporting

Context: A financial services firm needs real-time risk reporting, strict compliance, and AI-driven forecasting. They must integrate SAP finance data with external market feeds and apply advanced analytics.

Question: How can Financial Services Firm integrate third-party data with its SAP data using SAP Business Data Cloud?

Exam Questions Breakdown from My Attempt

Based on my recent experience, here’s how the exam questions were distributed:

  • Technical Knowledge of BDC: 40%
  • Integration with SAP Business Warehouse: 15%
  • Technical Knowledge of SAP Analytics Cloud: 15%
  • Technical Knowledge of SAP Datasphere: 15%
  • Technical Knowledge of SAP Databricks: 15%

Helpful Links

  1. Exploring SAP Business Data Cloud Learning Journey
  2. SAP Certification is Changing What You Need to Know about the New Format
  3. Reimagining Certification
  4. SAP Certified Associate SAP Business Data Cloud

entry.title: Live Session: Get Certified - SAP Generative AI Developer | May 6–20, 2026
entry.content:
Are you ready to dive into the world of Generative AI and become a certified expert with SAP? Our "Get Certified: SAP Certified - SAP Generative AI Developer" live session series is designed for developers and consultants at all levels – whether you're a beginner, intermediate, or advanced.

Join our expert trainers in a comprehensive series of live sessions dedicated to preparing you for the C_AIG certification: SAP Certified - SAP Generative AI Developer. This immersive learning experience includes a kick-off session, two content review sessions, hands-on practice, and a wrap-up session, all designed to ensure you're fully prepared to excel in your certification.

Key Highlights:

  • Kick-off Session: Learn the certification format, preparation tips, and access self-study content and hands-on practice systems.
  • Content Review Session 1: Deep dive into SAP Business AI, large language model fundamentals, and SAP’s Generative AI Hub features.
  • Content Review Session 2: Advanced techniques for prompt development, leveraging SAP Cloud SDK, and solving real-world business problems effectively.
  • Wrap-up Session: Final review and Q&A to strengthen your preparation before attempting the certification exam.

By the end of this series, you'll gain the knowledge and confidence to excel in the C_AIG certification and become an SAP Generative AI expert.

Who Should Attend:

  • Roles: Developers, Consultants.
  • Experience Levels: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced.

Upcoming Sessions:

  • May 6, 2026 - May 20, 2026:

Don't miss this opportunity to elevate your career and become an SAP Generative AI Developer. Register now and embark on your certification journey with confidence!

Find out more and register here.

Key Takeaways:

  • Understand SAP’s Generative AI hub interface, large language models, and business AI solutions.
  • Learn practical prompt engineering techniques to solve real-world business challenges using SAP Generative AI Hub.
  • Gain hands-on experience with SAP Cloud SDK for AI and advanced automation techniques.
  • Prepare effectively for the C_AIG certification with live expert support and Q&A sessions.

entry.title: My Experience with SAP Generative AI Developer Exam (C_AIG): Excellent Hands-On Format, One Setback
entry.content:
TL;DR: I recently took the SAP Certified – SAP Generative AI Developer (C_AIG) exam in SAP’s new, task-based format. Compared to the traditional proctored, MCQ-style certification (I previously passed the SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud ), this format felt refreshingly real: open-book, hands-on, and aligned with how we actually work: consulting documentation and credible sources to solve practical tasks. The difficulty was fair and thoughtfully designed. However, I faced a serious technical issue in the final minutes: the “Confirm Completion” button did not respond despite multiple attempts, leading to an immediate fail result likely due to the system not registering my submission within the two-hour lab window. I’ve raised a support case and hope SAP can review my completed work or grant a reattempt. Aside from this incident, I genuinely prefer this format over MCQs.



Why This New Format Matters

I appeared this exam after doing the MCQ-based backend ABAP developer certificate. That format is familiar and structured but it inevitably encourages memorization under pressure. The new C_AIG experience is different in the best way:

  • Open-book, real-world problem solving: You are allowed to consult documentation and reputable sources while completing practical tasks. That’s how work in an organization actually happens. The exam felt like a thoughtfully curated, time-boxed lab rather than a memory test.
  • Hands-on skill demonstration: Instead of proving you can recall definitions, you prove you can build and reason, under time constraints, with real tooling.
  • Deeper learning: Solving tasks practically is far more memorable and meaningful than “by-hearting” theory for MCQs. I came away with reinforced concepts and stronger confidence in applying them.

Frankly, I liked this new format very much: it’s unique, modern, and authentic.

Exam Flow: What I Experienced

  • When I started the 24-hour window, I could see the questions and plan my approach.
  • Once the system access was granted, the two-hour practical lab timer started.
  • The tasks were well-thought-out, reasonably tough, and lengthy in a productive way. You need both breadth and depth to complete them in time but they are absolutely solvable with focus and good time management.
  • Importantly, nothing exceeded the learning journey it was rigorous but fair. No trickery, just practical application of what you’re supposed to know.

This balance of open-book realism and tight timeboxing made it a genuinely strong assessment model.

 

The Technical Issue That Cost Me the Attempt

With ~10 minutes left on my two-hour lab window, I had completed all tasks, verified my answers, and proceeded, as instructed: to click “Confirm Completion” (the button near the “Get Access” control).

  • I clicked repeatedly.
  • I closed and reopened the browser.
  • I reopened the certification link.
  • I even re-established system access to the Generative AI environment.

Despite all that, there was no response from the “Confirm Completion” button. As the clock ran out, the portal eventually returned an instant failure. Based on the message and timing, it most likely meant the system did not register my submission within the two-hour lab period, even though I had completed and verified my work within time.

What makes it upsetting is that my work was done. I did what the assessment asked, thoroughly and on time, but the submission mechanism failed me. I’ve since registered a customer support case detailing the problem. I sincerely hope SAP can either:

  1. Verify my completed tasks from their system logs or workspace and give provide me with the honest result or certification, or
  2. Grant a fresh attempt, given the submission failure was technical in nature.

I’m a student who had 1 limited attempt for this certification which I really wanted to get, and losing one to a glitch, after honest preparation and timely completion was frustrating.

Closing Thoughts

The C_AIG exam’s design deserves recognition: it’s modern, fair, and genuinely skill-focused. My experience was positive until the submission glitch which has gotten me real frustrated and I hope for a quicker response from the support. I’m sharing this not to discourage, but to advocate for a smoother, more resilient submission process that matches the quality of the exam itself. I hope my case helps improve the candidate experience for everyone who follows.

entry.title: SAP Certification update: Practical exams roll out in 2026
entry.content:
Last November, we announced one of the most significant shifts in SAP Certification history: a move from traditional, multiple-choice exams to performance-based, practical, open-book assessments that reflect how SAP professionals actually work. The response from the SAP Community has been extraordinary.

More than 1,300 SAP TechEd attendees registered for onsite exams across Berlin, Bangalore, and Louisville, taking advantage of the opportunity to try the new model with authentic SAP systems and AI-supported scenarios. “I took the practical exam for the SAP Build Developer certification at SAP TechEd in Berlin and was impressed with how it reflected actual, on-the-job problem solving,” said Antonieta Lopez, an SAP Champion. “I needed some help in one task and was able to quickly solve the problem using AI, just as I would in real life. I really like the new certification exams because they are like real business instead of learning things by heart.”

Thousands more have embraced the new exam model, achieving practical certifications in Generative AI Developers, SAP Build Developers, SAP Business Data Cloud,  Solution Architects for SAP Business Technology Platform, SAP BTP System Administrators and RISE with SAP Methodology and Experience.

In the weeks following SAP TechEd, we’ve been busy transitioning all certification exams to the practical model and have been very pleased with the response from our community. Here are a few new practical exams you might want to explore first:

  • Positioning SAP Business AI Solutions as part of SAP Business Suite
  • Positioning SAP Business Suite
  • RISE with SAP Methodology and Experience
  • SAP Business Data Cloud
  • SAP Generative AI Developer
  • SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core and Position Management

Browse all practical exams  

Certification for a world where AI is part of the workday

If you’ve prepared for certification on the SAP Learning site, you’ve already experienced practical exercises and scenario-based tasks as part of the learning journeys. The new exams simply extend that learning approach, so the moment you begin your certification, it already feels familiar.

Every practical exam, whether system-based or scenario-based, mirrors the reality of SAP projects:

  • Timeboxed tasks in SAP systems
  • Realistic customer or project scenarios
  • AI-supported simulations
  • Open book: Access to resources like SAP Help Portal, SAP Learning site, SAP Community, and SAP Joule for Consultants (where applicable).
  • A clear focus on proving your ability to do the work

This shift is about trust: for learners who invest in their careers, and for employers who rely on SAP-certified professionals to deliver results from day one.

Be an early leader in the next era of SAP skills

As we roll out the full portfolio of performance-based certification exams in 2026, we want to encourage the community to take part. Not because certification exams will be easier (they won’t be) but because those who demonstrate practical skills now will help define what excellence looks like going forward.

We’re building a more trusted, meaningful, and future-ready certification framework and we invite you to be part of the shaping its future. To explore the new practical exams, visit the SAP Certification reimagined page and read the FAQ.

entry.title: Free Learning Journeys for Learning WalkMe which leads to certification
entry.content:
SAP WalkMe helps organizations to effectively implement their digital adoption strategies to increase the effectiveness and productiveness of their digital transformation journey. WalkMe is a digital adoption platform providing customers with framework which makes the Digital Transformation easier, faster and simpler. 

SAP Learning offers two learning journeys for learners:

  1. Positioning WalkMe

    This learning journey aims to provide you with core skills and knowledge of WalkMe and expertise to effectively discover, position, sell and recommend D.A.P in the market. The learning journey comprises of short courses - each about an hour long to consume. You will also be able to develop a deep understanding of WalkMe’s five key differentiators to effectively communicate its ROI, productivity benefits, and innovation leadership, apply the “Why Change, Why Now, Why WalkMe” framework to address customer concerns and emphasize the urgency of digital adoption and analyze the competitive landscape to confidently position WalkMe as the ultimate solution for enterprise digital transformation and long-term success.

    This learning journey is ideal for learners who are:
    1. In active customer-facing roles,
    2. Who are involved in digital transformation & Business Transformation Management roles
    3. Someone who are trying to understand the overview & basic features of WalkMe 

      Access the learning journey using this link here.

      Please note that completion of each course within the learning journey will entitle you for a completion badge. 

  2. Starting your Digital adoption journey with WalkMe

    This learning journey is the certification path for getting  certified as SAP Certified - WalkMe Digital Adoption Consultant. This certification verifies that the recipient has acquired a foundational understanding of Digital Adoption and the WalkMe platform, along with a comprehensive grasp of how to build solutions using WalkMe. Participants will learn to define key concepts, appreciate the value and applications of WalkMe, understand WalkMe's success methodology, and apply this knowledge to create content that addresses business challenges effectively.  

    This learning journey comprises of 3 courses - a) WalkMe Fundamentals, b) Getting Started with Building WalkMe Solutions and c) Advancing your skills in building WalkMe solutions. While fundamentals is a basic course covering high level details, the other two courses delve deeper into the WalkMe product to provide a detailed overview of concepts, tools, procedures, best practices etc. 

    This learning journey is ideal for learners who are:
    1. Involved in strategizing, designing and delivering digital adoption platform 
    2. Actively involved in WalkMe administration, Content creation, Analysis of user experience managemen
    3. Interested in getting WalkMe certification

      Access the learning journey using this link here.

      Please note that completion of each course within the learning journey will entitle you for a completion badge.

We also have a Get Certified Live session coming in March 2026 - you can get more details here about the same and also register.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Certification: A New Era of Skill Validation
entry.content:
SAP has completely redesigned the SAP Analytics Cloud certification, and with it, the way professional skills are assessed. 
The new SAP Analytics Cloud certification is no longer based on multiple-choice questions. There is no proctor, and it is open-book. Candidates engage in an AI-driven role-play exam designed to mirror how professionals actually work with SAP Analytics Cloud. You can prepare with our free learning content available on learning.sap.com.
 
How the new exam works
During the exam, you interact with an AI that asks 20 questions related to SAP Analytics Cloud. 
Key features of the new exam format include:
  • Immediate results: Once you complete your tasks, your performance is reviewed by AI, and you receive your result instantly.
  • Open book format: You can use documentation and resources just like you would in real work situations.
  • No proctoring: The exam experience is more flexible and accessible.
  • Smart retakes: If you fail a scenario and still have time left within the two-hour exam window, you can retake it immediately, and it still counts as a single exam attempt.
  • Pause functionality: You can pause the AI interaction if you need time to think, but be aware that the overall exam timer continues running. 
To help learners understand exactly what to expect, we created a short video that walks through the experience and shows how the AI role play works in practice.
 
A step toward future-ready certifications
The redesign of the SAP Analytics Cloud certification signals a broader transformation in professional learning and validation. As AI becomes a standard part of everyday workflows, certifications must evolve to assess judgment, problem-solving, and execution rather than isolated knowledge.
This move brings SAP certifications closer to how work is actually done and closer to how real-world skills should be measured.
It's time to start a new way of certification!

entry.title: Von der Theorie zur Praxis: Wie SAP-Zertifizierungen die moderne Arbeitswelt widerspiegeln
entry.content:
Heutige Projekte sind geprägt von Geschwindigkeit, Vernetzung und Zusammenarbeit. Wenn Sie komplexe Herausforderungen lösen, nutzen Sie selbstverständlich verfügbare Ressourcen, tauschen sich mit Experten aus und setzen die passenden digitalen Werkzeuge ein. Diese Realität spiegelt sich nun auch in der SAP-Zertifizierung wider.

Kompetenz statt Auswendiglernen: Der neue SAP Prüfungsansatz

SAP setzt auf einen fundamentalen Wandel: Weg von beaufsichtigten Multiple-Choice-Tests, hin zu leistungsorientierten, praktischen Open-Book-Bewertungen. Diese Innovation bringt Zertifizierungen in Einklang mit echten Arbeitsanforderungen.

Anstelle theoretischer Fragen bearbeiten Sie realitätsnahe Aufgaben, die Ihre praktische SAP-Kompetenz unter Beweis stellen. Sie konfigurieren Systeme, entwickeln Lösungen, analysieren Probleme und beraten bei strategischen Entscheidungen – genau wie in Ihrem beruflichen Alltag.

 

Das neue SAP Prüfungsformat bietet zwei innovative Ansätze:

 

Systembasierte Prüfungen:

Sie arbeiten direkt in SAP-Systemen und lösen zeitlich begrenzte, praxisrelevante Aufgaben. Diese Methode testet Ihre Fähigkeit, komplexe Systemfunktionalitäten effizient zu nutzen.

Szenariobasierte Prüfungen:

Sie interagieren mit KI-Avataren in realistischen Beratungs- und Projektsituationen. Für Teilnehmer, die KI-freie Alternativen bevorzugen, steht die Option zur Verfügung, Videoantworten für die manuelle Bewertung hochzuladen.

Arbeitsplatznahe Lernumgebung mit vollständigem Ressourcenzugang

Die Open-Book-Philosophie ermöglicht den Zugang zu allen relevanten Informationsquellen: SAP Help Portal, SAP Learning Site, SAP Community und SAP Joule for Consultants. Diese Herangehensweise entspricht der modernen Arbeitsrealität, in der Fachkräfte kontinuierlich auf Wissen und Tools zugreifen.

Nahtlose Integration von Lernen und Bewertung

Die Transformation schafft eine durchgängige Lernerfahrung. Die praktischen Übungen und Szenarien der SAP Learning Site führen nahtlos in die Prüfungssituation über. Vorbereitung und Zertifizierung verschmelzen zu einem kohärenten Entwicklungsprozess.

Jede Prüfung konzentriert sich auf die Demonstration echter Handlungskompetenz innerhalb realistischer Zeitrahmen. Die Identitätsbestätigung erfolgt über SAP Universal ID – ein vertrauensbasierter Ansatz, der professionelle Arbeitsstandards respektiert.

Systematische Einführung neuer SAP Zertifizierungsstandards

Der Rollout begann im November 2025 mit folgenden Zertifizierungen:

- Solution Architect für SAP Business Technology Platform

- SAP Generative AI Developer

- SAP Build Developer

- SAP Business Data Cloud

- SAP BTP System Administrator (neue Zertifizierung)

- RISE with SAP Methodology and Experience (neue Zertifizierung)

Seit Anfang 2026 sind alle SAP-Zertifizierungen auf das neue Format umgestellt. Dies betrifft sämtliche Fachbereiche: Beratung, Entwicklung, Administration und Vertrieb. Jeder Spezialist validiert seine Expertise unter realistischen Arbeitsbedingungen.

Konkrete Vorteile der neuen SAP Zertifizierungsstruktur

Die Umstellung auf praxisbasierte Prüfungen bringt messbare Verbesserungen für alle Beteiligten:

Für Fachkräfte: Ihre Zertifizierung weist praktische Kompetenzen und fundierte Problemlösungsfähigkeiten nach. Das Zertifikat wird zu einem aussagekräftigen Nachweis Ihrer beruflichen Qualifikation.

Für Arbeitgeber: Zertifizierte Mitarbeiter können ihre Expertise direkt in der Praxis anwenden. Die praxisnahe Validierung verkürzt Einarbeitungszeiten und bietet mehr Verlässlichkeit bei Personalentscheidungen.

Für die SAP-Community: Die arbeitsplatzorientierte Zertifizierung stärkt das Vertrauen in SAP-Qualifikationen und unterstützt die kontinuierliche Kompetenzentwicklung im gesamten Ökosystem.

KI-Integration für die digitale Zukunft

Die Einbindung von KI-Technologien in Prüfungsszenarien bereitet Fachkräfte gezielt auf die digitale Transformation vor. Sie lernen nicht nur SAP-Systeme zu beherrschen, sondern auch intelligente Tools effektiv in ihre Arbeitsprozesse zu integrieren.

Vertrauen durch Praxisbezug

Die Weiterentwicklung der SAP-Zertifizierung folgt einem klaren Grundsatz: Praxisnahe Prüfungen führen zu verwertbaren Kompetenzen. Wenn Zertifizierungen die reale Arbeitswelt abbilden, entstehen Qualifikationen mit echtem Mehrwert.

Die neue Zertifizierungsgeneration macht Ihr fachliches Engagement und Ihre Erfahrung sichtbar und nachprüfbar. Sie entwickeln Fähigkeiten, die sich direkt in beruflichen Erfolg umsetzen lassen. Mit dem Launch auf der SAP TechEd in Berlin hat SAP neue Standards für kompetenzbasierte Zertifizierung im digitalen Zeitalter etabliert. Diese Entwicklung unterstützt sowohl individuelle Karrierewege als auch die Innovationsfähigkeit von Unternehmen.

Weitere Informationen zu Certification finden Sie hier 

FAQs finden Sie unter diesem Link

entry.title: 30 Years of SAP Partnership and Certified Excellence: cbs a Trusted Partner for SAP Transformation
entry.content:
With more than 30 years of SAP experience and as a multiple-time certified operations partner, cbs - Corporate Business Solutions Unternehmensberatung GmbH - supports industrial companies through complex SAP S/4HANA, cloud, and AI projects. In this interview, cbs explains how industry focus, quality standards, and end-to-end services ensure reliable digital transformation.

 

Can you briefly introduce your company and explain which services you offer?

cbs, Corporate Business Solutions, designs digital end-to-end business process solutions for international industrial clients. With over 3,000 global projects, more than 30 years of market presence, dedicated industry know-how, and a unique, comprehensive offering for business transformation, we support our customers in establishing the next generation of enterprise solutions. Our global consulting organization includes the logistics subsidiary Leogistics and the HR consultancy Projekt0708, our own near- and offshore centers, and a strong partner network. In addition to its headquarters in Heidelberg, cbs is present at more than 40 offices worldwide. More than 1,700 employees across Europe, Asia, and the Americas manage projects and SAP operations for customers worldwide. From SAP strategy to project management and change management to implementation and application management. Business consulting is also a rapidly growing area for us. Here, we deal with topics such as target operating models and inventory optimization.                                                                                                                                        

 

You have been working with SAP for 30 years since its founding. How would you describe your experience so far, and are there any special events or milestones in this partnership that stand out in your memory?

Our founders were former SAP employees. As a result, we had excellent relationships with SAP from day one. This led to us being recommended to customers time and time again, and we lived up to these recommendations by delivering successful projects. It is also always important for us to understand which products or solutions SAP is developing so that we can make informed decisions about where to invest. We focused on GTS early on, trained employees, and carried out successful projects. We passed on the references to SAP so that we could do more business together.

The same applies to SAP S/4 HANA. We also focused on this topic early on, sending employees to Walldorf to participate in product testing, contribute our knowledge, and build new knowledge. We carried out initial projects at an early stage and then led the first SAP S/4HANA migration at Viessmann, a globally active manufacturing company. This was a showcase that DSAG presented at its 2019 annual congress together with the CIO of Viessmann and Christian Klein. We have a good relationship with the SAP Executive Board. We maintain close contact, and Christian Klein and Thomas Saueressig have attended our events on several occasions.  


In 2015, you decided for the first time to have your service portfolio certified by SAP - initially for SAP Business Suite solutions operations and, from 2021 onward, for SAP S/4HANA solutions operations. What motivated you to take this step at the time, and how do you evaluate this decision today?

It is in cbs's DNA to develop and build on its own topics. However, this means that we have little opportunity or knowledge of how our competitors are performing in these areas. On the other hand, we lacked a “seal of quality” to give our customers a certain degree of security. We were able to achieve both with the certification. The audits enabled us to identify areas for improvement, and passing the certification gave us proof we can use, especially when acquiring new customers. We have now completed the certification for the fifth time and still see the added value that certification brings us in the areas mentioned above. 

 

 

From your perspective, what has changed for the better since participating in the SAP Certification Program for Operations Partners?

Whereas knowledge of SAP products/modules used to be the main focus, the program has now shifted to emphasize the IT service process. I think this is absolutely essential and appropriate for certification as an SAP Operations Partner. At the same time, the program is adapted each time to reflect current relevant topics, such as cloud, RISE, Clean Core, or AI.

 

Handover of the certificate, January 2026

 

What makes your company stand out in particular, and how do you support different industries in their digital transformation?

Our industry focus is on the manufacturing sector. This includes traditional manufacturing companies, machine and plant manufacturers, electronics manufacturers, automotive suppliers, as well as customers in the process industry, pharmaceutical industry, and medical technology. We are convinced that it adds value for the customer when we understand the processes, are familiar with the problems typical of the industry, and have already solved them.

In this industry, many customers are still on their way to SAP S/4 HANA. In the context of this topic, however, a complete transformation project is often initiated so that additional SAP solutions are also introduced. Current examples include SAP EWM, Business Data Cloud, and SAP SuccessFactors.

We offer our customers all of this from a single source. To successfully implement large projects, our program and project managers now have comprehensive PMO support. These services handle test and cut-over management, for example. We have established our own change management division because we have seen that change management consultants in the market often lack SAP knowledge and understanding of SAP projects. We also offer consulting for the entire SAP Toolchain.

We are of the “Selective Data Transition Engagement”. Our cbs ET Enterprise Transformer helps to migrate data from ERP Systems (or other sources) to the new S/4 HANA System in a selective approach. Our application management services are also used in S/4 projects. Since projects often run for several years, but customers want to use their own employees in the project, we take over the management of the existing SAP landscape or provide support in the new landscape once the customer is live.

Apart from SAP S/4 projects, we have a large division in the field of BTP and AI. Here, we digitize processes that were not previously mapped in SAP at all, but rather across multiple systems, and in some cases also involved intermediate steps on paper. We bring these together in a SAP BTP solution, thereby accelerating the process, improving quality, and increasing transparency. We are increasingly using AI to further simplify and accelerate processes. With our AI-based text recognition, we achieve recognition rates of more than 98% and can create the corresponding SAP documents, e.g., sales order, purchase order, or invoice, directly from a piece of paper.

 
SAP is consistently aligning its strategy toward the cloud and encouraging partners to actively support their customers in migration. How are you currently supporting your customers in their cloud transformation, and do you plan to place an even stronger focus on cloud services in the future?

Functionally, we cover all SAP solutions that our customers need, whether on-premise or in the cloud. We are one of the few providers that can offer customers all services if they want to implement a full cloud solution (SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, SAP Business Data Cloud, SAP CX, SmartRecruiters, SAP SuccessFactors, Concur, Ariba, IBP, DM, SAP BTP, etc.). Our strategy is to deliver cloud projects whenever possible. For example, if we are short on resources and have to decide between a cloud project for one customer and an on-prem project for another, we would go with the cloud project. As the functionality is rising with every release, we recommend that every customer check if a cloud solution fits the requirements. From our point of view, the cloud solution is the go-to solution for every customer.

 

What significance do the certifications have for your marketing activities and for communication with your customers?

The certification provides us with external proof of our performance, our knowledge, and our service processes. We are always happy to use this in our acquisition processes.

 

 

 

Information on the certification program for operations partners and an overview of all certified partners can be found in the SAP Operations Partner Guide.

Visit OPC at SAP.com or on the SAP Partner Portal.

entry.title: Beyond the Code: How Continuous Learning Shapes Sebastiano’s Path
entry.content:
What does learning look like when it becomes part of everyday life?

For Sebastiano, it starts early. On a quiet New York morning, before most of the city is fully awake. After an early run and a walk with his dog, he checks messages that arrived overnight. Somewhere between time zones, priorities, and projects, learning has become a steady rhythm in his day rather than a separate task, one he never sees as an obligation, but as momentum.

He has always been driven by the idea of setting goals and pushing beyond them. What gives those goals meaning, however, is people. Family, friends, colleagues, and communities play a central role in his life. He believes no achievement is truly individual; progress happens when personal ambition meets collective effort. That balance between striving forward and moving together keeps him motivated.

In his current role, Sebastiano works as a lead consultant at his company, moving fluidly between architectural decisions and product direction. His background in Computer Science provided him with a strong technical foundation, but his curiosity has always extended beyond pure development. Over time, that curiosity has drawn him closer to project management and finance, where he focuses on aligning technical solutions with business outcomes and long-term value.

Learning has been the thread connecting these two worlds, helping him deepen what he already knows while gradually expanding how he thinks about building systems and solutions.

That mindset took shape early in his career. Together with a couple of colleagues, Sebastiano developed a simple but meaningful ritual: meeting an hour before work to have breakfast and study for their next certification. It was a time marked by curiosity, shared motivation, and the energy of being young and eager to grow. Looking back, those mornings remain a happy memory and a reminder that learning is often at its best when it is shared.

His days are fast-paced and varied. He moves between multiple projects, supports colleagues, adds new features, resolves issues, and helps guide product direction. Amid constant context-switching, learning keeps him grounded. Twice a week, without exception, he sets aside time for research and self-study.

That commitment became even more natural with SAP Certification. As Sebastiano explains, “My work is highly SAP-centric, and staying up to date is essential. Learning allows me to achieve my career goals, add value to my company, and remain competitive.”

For him, SAP Learning brings clarity to a fast-moving field, offering a structured way to explore new topics, revisit fundamentals, and stay closely connected to innovation as it evolves.

However, learning is not always comfortable. Sebastiano admits new challenges can be mentally demanding. He approaches learning step by step, accepting uncertainty and asking for help when needed, from colleagues or newer tools such as AI. The reward comes when something finally clicks, bringing a deep sense of satisfaction. For him, learning is an important goal in itself.

One of the most defining outcomes of this journey has been becoming an SAP Champion. The recognition marked more than a professional milestone; it reshaped how Sebastiano sees himself. Through learning and knowledge sharing, he built credibility, formed connections, and strengthened trust in his abilities. SAP Learning gave him the foundation and confidence to share what he knows. While impostor syndrome never fully disappears, continuous learning and real-world application have steadily reduced its grip.

If he imagines the future, learning is still at the center. A park, a book, his dog nearby, and the chance to discover something new every day. For Sebastiano, learning is not a phase. It is a way forward: steady, shared, always evolving.

As he puts it, “Learning keeps my mind open and helps me move through change with confidence. It reminds me that growth doesn’t come from having all the answers, but from staying curious, asking for help, and continuing to move forward.”

Ready to begin your own SAP learning journey? Explore the SAP Learning site and take the next step toward growing your skills and shaping your future.

entry.title: A New System-Based ABAP Certification Is Here - What Developers Need to Know
entry.content:
After a long wait, it’s finally here: a new practical ABAP certification exam designed to test what really matters. This time, you’ll be working hands-on in a live SAP system.

🚀SAP Certified - Backend Developer - ABAP Cloud (Beta Version)

 If you’re planning to take it, here’s what you should know - and how to prepare effectively.

💡Good to know!

The new exam https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-back-end-developer-abap-cloud focuses on solving practical development tasks based on the content of:

  • Basic ABAP Programming (S4D400)
  • Intermediate ABAP Programming (S4D401)
  • Data Modelling in ABAP Dictionary and ABAP Core Data Services (S4D430)

You’ll work in an ABAP environment on SAP BTP, using the ABAP language version for cloud development.

If your background is primarily on-premise ABAP, this is a mindset shift.

 ℹ️We’re currently in the Beta phase of the certification exam.

What that means for you:

  •  3-hour exam instead of the planned 4-hour version
  • Same full certification as the final release - no “beta” label
  • Early opportunity before the scope expands

 

After Beta, the exam will be extended to 4 hours with broader coverage.

Don’t work harder, work smarter. Secure your spot now!

 

The Environment – ABAP Cloud

ABAP Cloud promotes:

  • Model-driven development
  • Use of Core Data Services (CDS)
  • ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP)
  • Automatic exposure of services (OData/Web APIs)
    All leading to faster, more scalable apps and services. 

🤓Hint: Before you start, be sure to update your Eclipse and ADT installations to the latest versions.

 

Why Practice Systems Are Critical

The certification system will resemble the training and practice systems available in learning environments - but it won’t be identical.

 The practice systems, including the exercise handbooks and system setup guides to practice and prepare, can be found here:

  • Basic ABAP Programming S4D400
  • Intermediate ABAP Programming S4D401
  • Data Modelling in ABAP Dictionary and ABAP Core Data Services S4D430

🤓Hint: Please refer to the course file that is downloaded when clicking the access button for further log on information

 

 Preparation is Essential.

 The practice systems give you access to:

  • The same underlying data model used in the exam
  • Identical table and field names
  • A comparable development setup

 Getting familiar with the structure of the data model and working with ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse (ADT) will save you valuable time during the exam.

 ⏲ And time matters!

You’ll have three hours to complete the exam.  Three hours go faster than you think!

🤓Hint: Joule for Developers is available within the exam system. We recommend using it while working through the tasks to help you complete them more efficiently.

 

 How to Prepare

Along with the practice Systems mentioned above, the Learning Journey  Acquiring Core ABAP Skills will help you to prepare for your exam.

 

Good Luck 🍀 and Happy Learning!

 

For more information on the Reimagine Certification initiative, please read: Reimagining Certification for the Way We Work Toda... - SAP Community

 

SAP Learning Services Topic Page 
Ask questions about Training and follow 
Read other Training blog posts and follow

entry.title: New System Based Certifications for SAP S/4HANA Sales – Now Available!
entry.content:
These updated exams consist of real, hands‑on tasks executed directly in an SAP system. The result: a much stronger focus on applied skills and real‑world capability. In the area of Sales, we offer certifications for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition – Sales and for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition – Sales.

How to Prepare Successfully

1. Explore the official Learning Journeys (free on learning.sap.com)

Public Edition – Sales
👉 https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/implementing-sap-s4hana-cloud-public-edition-sales
Private Edition – Sales
👉 https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/implementing-sales-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-private-edition

These structured learning paths guide you through all essential topics included in the certification.

2. Get hands‑on practice

Use the available hands‑on training systems to run through exercises, demos, and end‑to‑end scenarios.
This practical experience is key for the new system‑based exam format. Hands-on systems can be found in the Learning Journeys.

3. Join the “Get Certified!” Live Sessions

SAP experts provide guidance, highlight important focus areas, and answer your questions — perfect for a confident exam day. Join the sessions or watch the recordings:

https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/get-certified-implementation-consultant-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-sales?searchId=63470ea3-be21-4301-97dc-1f476feecf10&listPosition=3

https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/get-certified-sap-certified-associate-sap-s-4hana-cloud-private-edition-sales

Why a system‑based certification?

Because real skills matter.
This new exam format demonstrates not only what you know, but what you can do inside SAP S/4HANA Sales.
A strong signal for customers, partners, and your own professional development.

Ready to boost your skills?

With Learning Journeys, hands‑on systems, and expert Live Sessions, you have everything you need to succeed in the new SAP S/4HANA Sales certifications in 2026.

entry.title: Building AI Skills for the Future of the SAP Ecosystem
entry.content:
Artificial Intelligence in the SAP ecosystem is entering a new chapter. We’ve moved from analytics to predictions, from predictions to generative AI, and now to Agentic AI; and this is where it gets truly exciting.

What Is Agentic AI?

Agentic AI goes beyond generating text or answering prompts. It can pursue goals, plan, decide, interact with systems, and execute multi-step actions within defined guardrails. While generative AI creates content, agentic AI drives outcomes, which is what matters most in enterprise environments.

In SAP, where processes connect finance, supply chain, procurement, and HR, this shift has enormous potential. SAP landscapes are structured, data-rich, and process-driven, ideal for intelligent agents that actively support and orchestrate business execution.

Imagine AI not only spotting a supply chain risk but triggering alternative sourcing workflows or detecting anomalies in financial postings and initiating clarification tasks automatically. This isn’t science fiction, it’s the direction enterprise AI is heading: from assistance to collaboration.

Under SAP’s Business AI strategy, AI is becoming embedded directly into applications and workflows. The vision is clear: AI as a digital co-worker. Not replacing people but augmenting them. Not adding complexity but reducing friction. Agentic AI is the next evolution in making that vision real.

 

 

Want to dive deeper into Agentic AI? Discover the mini agent blog series by @shannabauer and @christian_karaschewitz:

  • Envision the Future of Generative AI with SAP's AI Agents
  • AI Agents in Action
  • AI Agents - Thinking Fast & Thinking Slow, Balancing Autonomy and Determinism in Joule agents

 

Learning and Hands-On Opportunities for All Things AI

If you’re curious about how to identify real business impact, the course “Discovering High-Value Opportunities for Agentic AI” helps bridge innovation and value creation; a crucial skill as AI initiatives become more strategic. For a practical, hands-on introduction to working with intelligent agents, the Devtoberfest 2025 session “Getting Started with Agents using SAP Generative AI Hub” walks through the basics of building and experimenting with agent scenarios. Explore the full AI playlist for more resources with SAP Tech Bytes, Ask the Expert sessions and more on the SAP Developers YouTube channel. And for even more AI news, check out the monthly blog series that spotlights the latest AI learning assets and upcoming learning opportunities.

And the learning journey doesn’t stop there. SAP also offers several upcoming free live sessions open to anyone to bring AI innovation directly into practical enterprise scenarios:

  • Efficient Document Inbound Processing in SAP Cloud ERP with SAP Document AI – March 12, 2026: Discover how SAP Document AI streamlines inbound document handling in SAP Cloud ERP, reducing manual effort and increasing automation in finance and procurement processes.
  • All Things Business AI: Latest Insights, Updates & Live Demos – March 19, 2026: Get first-hand insights into SAP’s Business AI strategy, explore the newest updates, and experience live demonstrations of AI capabilities embedded across the SAP portfolio.
  • Build AI Securely – Avoid Pitfalls in the Development and Operations Lifecycle – April 9, 2026: Learn how to design, develop, and operate AI solutions securely, while avoiding common risks in governance, compliance, and lifecycle management.

 

Ready to dive deeper? Don’t miss the upcoming local SAP CodeJam events, where you can get hands-on experience with Generative AI Hub, SAP Joule, and AI-powered applications:

  • March 16, 2026:  Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Risch-Rotkreuz, Switzerland)
  • March 17, 2026:  Joule Studio: Create Joule Skills and Agents Without Coding (Risch-Rotkreuz, Switzerland)
  • March 20, 2026: Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Madrid, Spain)
  • March 20, 2026:  Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Belo Horizonte, Brazil)
  • April 7, 2026: ABAP AI: Capabilities in SAP Joule for Developers CodeJam (São Paulo, Brazil)
  • April 8, 2026:  ABAP AI: Capabilities in SAP Joule for Developers CodeJam (Londrina, Brazil)
  • April 10, 2026: Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Curitiba, Brazil)
  • April 10, 2026: SAP HANA Cloud for AI Applications: ML, Vectors, and Knowledge Graphs (Ribeirão Preto, Brazil)
  • And much more – check out the full list of all upcoming events here.

 

AI Literacy: Core Competency for SAP Professionals

Here’s the most important part: you don’t need to be a data scientist to participate in this transformation. What you do need is AI literacy. Understanding the fundamentals of artificial intelligence, generative AI, and how SAP AI services integrate into enterprise processes is quickly becoming a core competency for SAP professionals.

For developers ready to build AI-powered applications, the SAP Generative AI Developer certification validates hands-on expertise in designing and integrating generative AI within SAP environments. For consultants and presales professionals shaping customer conversations, the Positioning SAP Business AI Solutions as Part of the SAP Business Suite certification strengthens the ability to translate AI capabilities into business value.

Agentic AI represents a shift from “What can AI tell me?” to “What can AI achieve with me?”

For those working in the SAP ecosystem, this is more than a trend — it’s the next capability layer on top of digital transformation. The professionals who understand how to design, position, and work alongside AI agents will shape the next generation of enterprise processes.

The future of SAP is intelligent. The future of AI is agentic. And the opportunity to grow with it starts now.

entry.title: SAP’s Most Popular Certification Gets a Major Upgrade
entry.content:
March is officially the month of ABAP. SAP’s most popular certification for back-end developers, the Back-End Developer ABAP Cloud exam, is getting a major upgrade. At the same time, the SAP Community developer challenge for ABAP is going live, making this the perfect moment to sharpen your skills and validate your expertise.

 

A Reimagined Certification Experience

The ABAP Cloud certification exam has been redesigned. Moving beyond traditional question-based formats, the new exam introduces a performance-based, open-book experience. Learners now work directly in authentic SAP systems, navigating AI-supported, real-world scenarios that reflect actual project work. The focus is no longer on memorization; it’s about demonstrating practical skills that matter on the job.

 

What Does It Mean for You?

If you’ve been preparing for certification through the SAP Learning site, you’re already familiar with hands-on exercises and scenario-based tasks embedded in the learning journeys. The new exam format simply extends that approach. From the moment you begin your certification, the experience feels familiar because it mirrors how you’ve been learning all along.

Every practical exam, whether system-based or scenario-driven reflects the reality of SAP projects:

  • Timeboxed tasks performed in live SAP systems
  • Realistic customer and project scenarios
  • AI-supported simulations
  • Open-book access to resources such as SAP Help Portal, SAP Learning, SAP Community, and SAP Joule for Consultants (where applicable)
  • A clear emphasis on proving your ability to do the work

This shift represents something bigger: trust. Trust in learners who invest in building real skills and trust from employers who rely on SAP-certified professionals to deliver value from day one.

 

How to Get Certified as Backend Developer for ABAP Cloud

Earning your certification is a structured journey. Whether you are new to ABAP or looking to formalize years of experience, the following resources will help you build a strong foundation and deepen your expertise.

 

Recommended Courses to Build and Deepen Your Skills

Start with the fundamentals and progressively expand your knowledge:

Course: Learning Basic ABAP Programming

Course: Deepening Your ABAP Programming Knowledge

Course: Building Data Models with the ABAP Dictionary and ABAP Core Data Services

Course: Practicing Clean Core Extensibility for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

SAP Certification: Backend Developer - ABAP Cloud

 

Together, these courses prepare you not just to pass the exam but to succeed in real-world ABAP Cloud development. Learn more about the exam details in this community blog by @JenniferHauck.

 

 

Connect Live with SAP Experts and Strengthen Your Exam Readiness

Learning doesn’t have to be a solo experience. If you’re looking for direct interaction, practical tips, and expert guidance, join the upcoming live sessions available through your SAP Learning Hub subscription:

  • Getting Started with ABAP Cloud Development
  • Get Certified: SAP Certified – Back-End Developer ABAP Cloud
  • Stay Certified: Back-End Developer – ABAP Cloud

These sessions offer the opportunity to clarify questions, reinforce key concepts, and gain confidence before taking the exam.

 

Experience Hands-On Learning at SAP CodeJam Events Near You

If you prefer immersive, in-person learning, don’t miss the upcoming SAP CodeJam events. These workshops are designed to provide practical, guided experience with real SAP technologies in a collaborative environment.

Upcoming sessions include:

  • April 7: ABAP AI: Capabilities in SAP Joule for Developers CodeJam (São Paulo, Brazil)
  • April 8: ABAP AI: Capabilities in SAP Joule for Developers CodeJam (Londrina, Brazil)
  • April 23: ABAP Cloud and the RESTful Application Programming Model (Warsaw, Poland)

These events are an excellent opportunity to deepen your understanding, expand your network, and gain hands-on practice. Be sure to explore the full event calendar regularly, as new sessions are added on an ongoing basis.

 

Continue Your Learning with On-Demand Developer Content

Can’t attend live? Explore past Devtoberfest sessions, Tech Bytes, SAP CodeTalks, and more on the official SAP Developers YouTube channel. On-demand content allows you to learn at your own pace while staying connected to the latest innovations in ABAP and SAP development.

March is the perfect time to invest in your ABAP Cloud journey. With a certification experience designed to reflect real project work, you’re not just passing an exam, you’re demonstrating that you’re ready to build, extend, and innovate in the SAP ecosystem.

entry.title: SAP’s Most Popular Certification Gets a Major Upgrade
entry.content:
March is officially the month of ABAP. SAP’s most popular certification for back-end developers, the Back-End Developer ABAP Cloud, is getting a major upgrade. At the same time, the SAP Community developer challenge for ABAP is going live, making this the perfect moment to sharpen your skills and validate your expertise.

 

A Reimagined Certification Experience

The ABAP Cloud certification exam has been redesigned. Moving beyond traditional question-based formats, the new exam introduces a performance-based, open-book experience.

Learners now work directly in authentic SAP systems, navigating AI-supported, real-world scenarios that reflect actual project work. The focus is no longer on memorization; it’s about demonstrating practical skills that matter on the job.

What does it mean for you?

If you’ve been preparing for certification through the SAP Learning site, you’re already familiar with hands-on exercises and scenario-based tasks embedded in the learning journeys. The new exam format simply extends that approach.

From the moment you begin your certification, the experience feels familiar because it mirrors how you’ve been learning all along.

Every practical exam, whether system-based or scenario-driven reflects the reality of SAP projects:

  • Timeboxed tasks performed in live SAP systems
  • Realistic customer and project scenarios
  • AI-supported simulations
  • Open-book access to resources such as SAP Help Portal, SAP Learning, SAP Community, and SAP Joule for Consultants (where applicable)
  • A clear emphasis on proving your ability to do the work

This shift represents something bigger: trust. Trust in learners who invest in building real skills and trust from employers who rely on SAP-certified professionals to deliver value from day one.

 

How to get certified as Backend Developer for ABAP Cloud

Earning your certification is a structured journey. Whether you are new to ABAP or looking to formalize years of experience, the following resources will help you build a strong foundation and deepen your expertise.

 

Recommended Courses to Build and Deepen Your Skills

Start with the fundamentals and progressively expand your knowledge:

  • Course: Learning Basic ABAP Programming
  • Course: Deepening Your ABAP Programming Knowledge
  • Course: Building Data Models with the ABAP Dictionary and ABAP Core Data Services
  • Course: Practicing Clean Core Extensibility for SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • SAP Certification: Backend Developer - ABAP Cloud

 

Together, these courses prepare you not just to pass the exam but to succeed in real-world ABAP Cloud development. Learn more about the exam details in this community blog by @JenniferHauck.

 

Connect Live with SAP Experts and Strengthen Your Exam Readiness

Learning doesn’t have to be a solo experience. If you’re looking for direct interaction, practical tips, and expert guidance, join the upcoming live sessions available through your SAP Learning Hub subscription:

  • Getting Started with ABAP Cloud Development
  • Get Certified: SAP Certified – Back-End Developer ABAP Cloud
  • Stay Certified: Back-End Developer – ABAP Cloud

These sessions offer the opportunity to clarify questions, reinforce key concepts, and gain confidence before taking the exam.

 

Join the ABAP Developer Community to Learn, Share, and Grow

Certification is just one milestone in your journey. Continuous learning happens through collaboration.

Visit the ABAP developer forum here on the SAP Community to:

  • Read expert blogs
  • Ask technical questions
  • Share your own insights
  • Connect with developers worldwide

Being part of the community ensures you stay current and continue growing long after certification.

 

Experience Hands-On Learning at SAP CodeJam Events Near You

If you prefer immersive, in-person learning, don’t miss the upcoming SAP CodeJam events. These sessions are designed to provide practical, guided experience with real SAP technologies in a collaborative environment.

Upcoming sessions include:

  • April 7: ABAP AI: Capabilities in SAP Joule for Developers CodeJam (São Paulo, Brazil)
  • April 8: ABAP AI: Capabilities in SAP Joule for Developers CodeJam (Londrina, Brazil)
  • April 23: ABAP Cloud and the RESTful Application Programming Model (Warsaw, Poland)

 

These events are an excellent opportunity to deepen your understanding, expand your network, and gain hands-on practice. Be sure to explore the full event calendar regularly, as new sessions are added on an ongoing basis.

 

Continue Your Learning with On-Demand Developer Content

Can’t attend live? Explore past Devtoberfest sessions, Tech Bytes, SAP CodeTalks, and more on the official SAP Developers YouTube channel

On-demand content allows you to learn at your own pace while staying connected to the latest innovations in ABAP and SAP development.

March is the perfect time to invest in your ABAP Cloud journey. With a certification experience designed to reflect real project work, you’re not just passing an exam, you’re demonstrating that you’re ready to build, extend, and innovate in the SAP ecosystem.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition certifications updated to release 2602
entry.content:
We’re excited to share that all SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition certification exams have now been updated to reflect the features, enhancements, and innovations delivered with the 2602 release.

This update ensures that learners, consultants, and implementation teams continue to validate their skills based on the most current capabilities of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

What This Means for You

1. Exams Aligned with the Latest Release

All learning journeys, courses, practice systems, and system-based exams have been refreshed to align with the 2602 product release. Learners preparing for an exam can expect content that reflects the newest system behavior, UI updates, functional enhancements, and configuration options.

2. Updated Learning Resources

To support learners in their preparation, corresponding SAP Learning content has also been updated. You’ll now find:

  • Revised learning journeys and course material
  • Updated hands-on exercises where applicable
  • New or updated learning system environments reflecting 2602

3. Smooth Transition for Ongoing Learners

If you were already preparing for a certification, you can continue studying without disruption. Updated materials are available immediately, and exam codes remain unchanged unless otherwise communicated in the individual learning journey.

4. Stay Current with SAP Innovations

SAP’s commitment to continuous enablement ensures that certifications stay relevant and reflect the latest release cycles. By certifying on 2602, you demonstrate knowledge and readiness aligned with SAP’s most recent innovations.

What You Should Do Next

Visit the updated learning journeys to access the updated materials:

    • Applying End-to-End Business Processes in SAP Business Suite
    • Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
    • Implementing Financial Accounting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
    • Implementing Management Accounting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
    • Implementing Sales in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
    • Implementing Sourcing and Procurement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Schedule your certification exam when you’re ready—you’ll now be tested on 2602 content.

entry.title: The New Get Certified Series to Master the New Practical Exams for SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Recently, the C_C4H32 (SAP Certified Associate - Business User - SAP Commerce Cloud) and P_C4H34 (SAP Certified Professional - Developer - SAP Commerce Cloud) certifications have transitioned from traditional multiple-choice formats to hands-on practical exams. In these new exams, you won't just answer questions - you will perform essential tasks within a live SAP Commerce Cloud environment.

To ensure you are fully prepared for this new challenge, we are launching two dedicated Get Certified live session series. Led by expert trainers, these sessions provide the guidance, tips, and technical walkthroughs you need to succeed.

1. Get Certified: SAP Certified Associate – Business User – SAP Commerce Cloud

This series is designed for those aiming for the C_C4H32 (Business User - SAP Commerce Cloud) certification. Our expert trainers will complement your self-study by focusing on the most essential business-user topics aligned with the practical exam.

Preparation Path:

  1. Start with the Learning Journey: Configuring SAP Commerce Cloud
  2. Attend the following live sessions:
  • Session 1: Kick Off and Overview (1 hour) – Get insights into the series goals, the practical exam process, and effective study strategies.
  • Session 2: Mastering Product Modeling, Web Content, and Commerce Management (1.5 hours) – A deep dive into core configuration, focusing on product modeling, web content and commerce management.
  • Session 3: Exploring Order Management, Customer Support, and B2B Commerce (1.5 hours) – Master the essential foundations of order management, customer support and B2B features within the platform.

Goal: By the end of this series, you will understand the practical exam format and be ready to attempt the C_C4H32 certification with confidence.

2. Get Certified: SAP Certified Professional – Developer – SAP Commerce Cloud

Targeting the P_C4H34 (Developer - SAP Commerce Cloud) certification? This series provides developer/technical consultant-level technical deep dives into the critical topic areas you will encounter during the practical exam.

Preparation Path:

  1. Start with the Learning Journey: Implementing SAP Commerce Cloud
  2. Attend the following live sessions:
  • Session 1: Kick Off and Overview (1 hour) – Understand the scope of the developer certification and how to navigate the practical exam environment.
  • Session 2: Exploring Product Data Modeling, Services, and Order Management (1.5 hours) – Focus on system architecture, data modeling, service implementation, and customizing order processes.
  • Session 3: Mastering Commerce, Web Content Management, and Integration Support (1.5 hours) – Learn to configure search, promotions, web content, personalization, and integration support.

Goal: This series ensures you are equipped with the technical knowledge and hands-on understanding required to pass the P_C4H34 professional-level exam.

Why Join These Live Sessions?

The transition to practical exams means that hands-on experience is the key to success. By participating in these series, you will:

  • Review Key Tested Points: For every topic area and domain, your trainer will walk you through the specific key points and concepts being tested in the exam.
  • Practice with Domain-Specific Tasks: For every exam domain or topic area, you will receive similar sample tasks to ensure you are comfortable with the specific requirements of each section.
  • Receive Expert Walkthroughs: See exactly how a certified trainer approaches complex tasks.
  • Access Targeted Reference Materials: Gather specific resources to support your final preparation.

Are you ready to turn your knowledge into certified expertise?

Review the relevant Learning Journeys today and register for the Get Certified live sessions:

  • Get Certified: SAP Certified Associate – Business User – SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Get Certified: SAP Certified Professional – Developer – SAP Commerce Cloud

We look forward to seeing you there and helping you achieve your certification goals!

Happy learning!

entry.title: Program Update: SAP SuccessFactors Professional Certification Discontinued
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

During my recent session, I received a question about the current status of the SAP SuccessFactors Professional Certification. SAP has published an important program update, so I wanted to share the key information with you.

📌 Program Update: SAP SuccessFactors Professional Certification

As SAP reimagines certification in the age of AI, the SAP SuccessFactors Professional Certification program is being discontinued. This change is part of a broader shift toward a more dynamic and skills‑based learning model.

What this means for consultants

If you previously earned a Professional‑level certification, here are the key points to be aware of:

  • Certification levels will no longer be used
    SAP is moving away from the Associate/Professional structure as it introduces a new, continuous skills‑validation framework.

  • You can maintain the validity of your certifications
    By completing the assigned assessment linked to your certification, you can keep both levels (Associate + former Professional) active under the new model.

This transition supports SAP’s strategy to align certification with real‑time product updates and continuous learning.

Source: SAP Learning: Human Capital Management - Program Update 
Best regards
Tatiana

entry.title: Announcing the First-Ever System-Based Certification for SAP Sales Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
On behalf of the Product Learning team at SAP, I am excited to announce the release of a groundbreaking new certification now available on the learning.sap.com platform: the
Implementation Consultant – SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 Certification.
This milestone marks a major shift in how SAP validates real-world skills by moving away from traditional theory-based assessments and toward practical, scenario-driven, hands-on evaluations.

🌟A New Era of Practical, System-Based Assessment

Unlike standard multiple-choice exams, this new certification provides candidates with:
  • A live SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 system, and
  • A PDF containing a set of realistic tasks to complete
Candidates perform actual configuration and scenario-based exercises directly in the system. Once all required tasks are completed, they can submit their results for automated evaluation. Within minutes, candidates will know whether they have passed or failed — offering a faster, more authentic, and more meaningful way to validate capability.
This practical approach ensures that certified consultants are not only knowledgeable but also skilled in applying SAP Sales Cloud functionality in realistic customer scenarios.

🎯Who Is This Certification For?

This certification is designed for:
  • Implementation consultants
  • System administrators
  • Business users working with SAP Sales Cloud Version 2
It is classified as an intermediate‑level certification and requires approximately 2 hours to complete.

📚How to Prepare

To set yourself up for success, we recommend the following preparation path:

1. Complete the SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 Learning Courses

The foundational and advanced courses available on learning.sap.com provide the essential knowledge you need before attempting the hands‑on tasks. 

2. Practice Using the Hands-On System Exercises

Strengthen your confidence by trying out interactive exercises on a practical system . This helps you become familiar with the interfaces, workflows, and configuration steps you’ll be expected to perform during the certification. 

3. (Optional) Attend the In-Person Classroom Training

For learners who prefer guided instruction, an SAP classroom training session is available. This provides expert-led, structured practice to deepen your understanding and skill level. 

📢Spread the Word!

Help us share this exciting update with partners, colleagues, and other stakeholders.

📝We Value Your Feedback

After completing the certification, please take a moment to share your feedback. Your insights help us continuously improve the learning experience.

entry.title: Announcing the First-Ever System-Based SAP Commerce Cloud Business User Certification
entry.content:
On behalf of the Product Learning team at SAP, I am excited to introduce a new way to validate SAP Commerce Cloud skills: a system-based certification that measures your ability to perform real tasks and scenarios in SAP Commerce Cloud. Instead of selecting answers on a theory-only exam, you’ll complete hands-on activities in an SAP-provisioned environment—demonstrating the day-to-day capabilities that matter on live sites. Full details and the latest policies are available on the certification page:

SAP Certified - Business User - SAP Commerce Cloud

 

🌟A New Era of Practical, System-Based Assessment

Unlike standard multiple-choice exams, this new certification provides candidates with:
  • A SAP Commerce Cloud system, and
  • A PDF containing a set of realistic tasks to complete
Candidates perform actual configuration and scenario-based exercises directly in the system. Once all required tasks are completed, they can submit their results for automated evaluation. Within minutes, candidates will know whether they have passed or failed — offering a faster, more authentic, and more meaningful way to validate capability.
This practical approach ensures that certified consultants are not only knowledgeable but also skilled in applying SAP Commerce Cloud functionality in realistic customer scenarios.

🎯Why System Based Certifications?

The reimagined SAP Certification exams offer a range of benefits. More specifically:

  • Job-ready proof: Demonstrates you can navigate SAP Commerce Cloud and execute business-critical tasks—not just recall concepts.
  • Strong SAP signal: An SAP-recognized credential and digital badge that hiring managers and project leads across the ecosystem trust.
  • Practice over memorization: Preparation aligns to SAP Learning Journeys and hands-on exercises for better retention and impact.
  • Real-world relevance: Validates cross-functional workflows (catalog, content, search, promotions) that move conversion and revenue KPIs.
  • Always current: Content and recertification align with SAP’s cloud release cycle, reflecting the latest features and UI. 
  • Higher integrity than Q&A-only: Performance on practical tasks reduces guesswork and emphasizes authentic ability.

👤 Who Is This Certification For?

This certification is designed for:

  • Business Users
  • Consultants

It is classified as an intermediate‑level certification and requires approximately 3 hours to complete.

📚How to Prepare

To set yourself up for success, we recommend the following preparation path:

1. Complete the "Configuring SAP Commerce Cloud" Learning Journey

The Learning Journey for Business Users and Consultants on learning.sap.com provide the foundational knowledge required for the hands-on portion of the certification. They combine structured courses with access to practice systems for guided exercises, building familiarity with the interfaces, workflows, and configuration steps assessed.

2. (Optional) Attend the In-Person Classroom Training

For learners who prefer guided instruction, an SAP classroom training session is available. This provides expert-led, structured practice to deepen your understanding and skill level. 

 

📢Spread the Word!

Help us share this exciting update with partners, colleagues, and other stakeholders.

📝We Value Your Feedback

After completing the certification, please take a moment to share your feedback. Your insights help us continuously improve the learning experience.
 
Two easy ways to share feedback!
  1. Click “Share Feedback” to submit your thoughts. 

     

  2. In the “Notification Center” under “Learning” you can select the congratulatory email after completing course or learning journey and click “Feedback” to share your thoughts.

entry.title: Announcing the First-Ever System-Based SAP Commerce Cloud Developer Certification
entry.content:
On behalf of the Product Learning team at SAP, I am excited to introduce a new way to validate your SAP Commerce Cloud development skills: a system-based certification that measures your ability to perform real tasks and scenarios in SAP Commerce Cloud. Instead of selecting answers on a theory-only exam, you’ll complete hands-on activities in an SAP-provisioned environment—demonstrating the day-to-day capabilities that matter on live sites. Full details and the latest policies are available on the certification page:

SAP Certified - Developer - SAP Commerce Cloud

 

🌟A New Era of Practical, System-Based Assessment

Unlike standard multiple-choice exams, this new certification provides candidates with:
  • A SAP Commerce Cloud system, and
  • A PDF containing a set of realistic tasks to complete
Candidates perform actual configuration and scenario-based exercises directly in the system. Once all required tasks are completed, they can submit their results for automated evaluation. Within minutes, candidates will know whether they have passed or failed — offering a faster, more authentic, and more meaningful way to validate capability.
This practical approach ensures that certified consultants are not only knowledgeable but also skilled in applying SAP Commerce Cloud functionality in realistic customer scenarios.

🎯Why System Based Certifications?

The reimagined SAP Certification exams offer a range of benefits. More specifically:

  • Job-ready proof: Demonstrates you can navigate SAP Commerce Cloud and execute business-critical tasks—not just recall concepts.
  • Strong SAP signal: An SAP-recognized credential and digital badge that hiring managers and project leads across the ecosystem trust.
  • Practice over memorization: Preparation aligns to SAP Learning Journeys and hands-on exercises for better retention and impact.
  • Real-world relevance: Validates cross-functional workflows (catalog, content, search, promotions) that move conversion and revenue KPIs.
  • Always current: Content and recertification align with SAP’s cloud release cycle, reflecting the latest features and UI. 
  • Higher integrity than Q&A-only: Performance on practical tasks reduces guesswork and emphasizes authentic ability.

👤 Who Is This Certification For?

This certification is designed for:

  • Developers
  • Technical Consultants

It is classified as an advanced‑level certification and requires approximately 3 hours to complete.

📚How to Prepare

To set yourself up for success, we recommend the following preparation path:

1. Complete the "Implementing SAP Commerce Cloud" Learning Journey

The Learning Journey for Developers and Technical Consultants on learning.sap.com provide the foundational knowledge required for the hands-on portion of the certification. They combine structured courses with access to practice systems for guided exercises, building familiarity with the interfaces, workflows, and configuration steps assessed.

2. (Optional) Attend the In-Person Classroom Trainings

For learners who prefer guided instruction, two classes are available:

  • SAP Commerce Cloud Developer Part 1
  • SAP Commerce Cloud Developer Part 2

These classes provide expert-led, structured instruction and practice to deepen your understanding and skills.

 

📢Spread the Word!

Help us share this exciting update with partners, colleagues, and other stakeholders.

📝We Value Your Feedback

After completing the certification, please take a moment to share your feedback. Your insights help us continuously improve the learning experience.
 
Two easy ways to share feedback!
  1. Click “Share Feedback” to submit your thoughts. 
  2. In the “Notification Center” under “Learning” you can select the congratulatory email after completing course or learning journey and click “Feedback” to share your thoughts.
